response.justification: The candidate is a strong generalist software engineer (TypeScript/Node.js, DLang, web/mobile/embedded) with solid craftsmanship practices, but the resume does not match this C++ capital-markets role. C++ exposure is limited and dated (NI LabWindows/CVI components and a university thesis), not 5–10 years of hands-on C++ on Windows. There is no SQL Server/Oracle experience and no fixed income, derivatives, investment banking, or capital-markets domain background, which are mandatory requirements.
strengths: Broad, deep general engineering experience with strong TDD/CI/CD craftsmanship
Some prior C/C++ exposure (LabWindows/CVI components, C++ thesis project)
concerns: No 5–10 years of strong C++ on Windows; C++ is minor and dated
No SQL Server/Oracle; SQL background is MySQL/MongoDB-oriented
No fixed income or investment banking / capital markets domain experience
